listeners.purpose: Refuses the Branch archive when any active/paused Athlete still references it. Fires a domain-level refusal; the branch module surfaces the error as BRANCH_HAS_ACTIVE_ATHLETES (409). Same-shape as the facility + staff sibling hooks.

Pre-write hook: refuses the User soft-delete when the User has an active linked Athlete row (user_id-based FK) OR when the User is consent_recorded_by_user_id for any active minor athlete. Surfaces USER_HAS_ACTIVE_ATHLETE OR USER_IS_MINOR_CONSENT_RECORDER.

In-band resolution of Athlete.current_age_group_id at create time. Runs AgeGroupResolver::resolveFor(athlete.dob) + updates the row before returning the create response. Without it, athletes would appear age-group-less until the next nightly RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob pass.
Reverses PreventUserArchiveWithActiveAthlete. When the User has zero remaining active Athlete rows across all tenants, clears the block flag so a subsequent User archive succeeds.
Wave 3a sibling: when an athlete withdraws, cascade-cancel every active AthleteEnrollment (transitions to withdrawn). Only fires when the withdrawal was invoked with cascade=true.
Wave 3a sibling: cascade-close every active AthleteEnrollment (transitions to completed). Only fires when the graduate was invoked with cascade=true.

When an AgeGroup's bounds shift, recompute snapshots for every affected athlete in the tenant. Small tenants: in-band (bounded work). Enterprise tenants: defer to next nightly RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob (batched — a bounds change could touch thousands of rows).
Cascade delete via FK; migrates athlete_medical_history rows to the compliance-archive table (they outlive the tenant per 7-year medical retention).
When a User activates (email verification completes), sweep for unlinked Athlete rows matching this User's email (metadata.email_hint). Auto-links + fires AthleteLinkedToUser. Skipped for minors.
